sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפך

Transliteration: shâphak

Phonetic: shaw-fak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to pour, pour out, spill
    1. (Qal)
      1. to pour, pour out
      2. to shed (blood)
      3. to pour out (anger or heart) (figuratively)
    2. (Niphal) to be poured out, be shed
    3. (Pual) to be poured out, be shed
    4. (Hithpael)
      1. to be poured out
      2. to pour out oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2444

Part(s) of speech: Verb
